cards.entryTitle: Art, Music, and the Migrant In-Between
cards.title: Frida Kahlo, The Bus
cards.creator: Frida Kahlo
cards.notice: Frida Kahlo, The Bus shows people in transit and social in-between-ness through a crowded, everyday vehicle.

cards.entryTitle: Art, Music, and the Migrant In-Between
cards.title: Migration Series
cards.creator: Jacob Lawrence
cards.notice: Migration Series turns mass movement into a 60-panel story of displacement, hope, memory, and arrival-in-progress.

cards.entryTitle: Art, Music, and the Migrant In-Between
cards.title: Borderlands
cards.creator: Kovi Konowiecki
cards.notice: Borderlands shows the migrant in-between through contemporary images of border life, distance, identity, and unresolved belonging.
